subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath been attracted by the verses of his Lord, who hath turned towards the Kaaba of his Purpose, and hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی انجذب من آیات ربه و اقبل الی کعبه المقصود و فاز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
